MINI MINUTES: Parties memorialize stipulation. Defendant to vacate by 3:00 pm, 6-10-2002, the premises located at 1388 California Street, #208 and receive $500. Alternatively, if defendant fails to vacate, judgment for back rent and possession will issue ex parte. Clerk, D. Feinberg; Commissioner, L. Norris; Reporter, Joyce Long.
